@if (result && !loading) {

Updated Vendor Details

Vendor ID{{result.vendorId}}
Name{{result.vendorName}}
Description{{result.description || 'N/A'}}
Contact Person{{result.contactPersonName || 'N/A'}}
Email{{result.contactEmail}}
Phone{{result.contactPhone}}
Website URL{{result.websiteUrl || 'N/A'}}
Total Gold Quantity{{result.totalGoldQuantity || 0}} g
Gold Price₹{{result.currentGoldPrice}}
Created At{{result.createdAt | date:'medium'}}
}
